name: zero_velocity_no_arm
description: current_return equals prev_return so velocity = 0. Threshold is positive (0.5), currently_armed=False. Velocity (0) is NOT >= threshold (0.5), so should_arm must be False. Pins the no-movement regime: a flat tape never arms parabolic.
derivation: velocity = current_return - prev_return = 1.25 - 1.25 = 0.0. should_arm = (velocity >= para_threshold) AND (not currently_armed) = (0.0 >= 0.5) AND (not False) = False AND True = False.
